title: Rat Attack
description: Adds a bunch of rats, name is minorly related.
body:
![](https://imgur.com/Dx9XE4a.png "Title")

This mod adds 20 rats to your Minecraft world, along with a couple of new rat-related structures, and a few new items.

Among the new items are meatballs, a staff that can summon rats, rats differing depending on which of the new rat totems you have. Along with 2 summoning blocks for boss rats, said rats don't actually do that much.. but they have a large chunk of health.
You can also eat the rats, some giving effects.

Have fun with it, that's all.
